tools.name: note.getNote
tools.description: Retrieves a given note in VTEX DO, filtering by `noteId`.

tools.name: note.getNotesbyorderId
tools.description: Retrieves notes related to a specific `orderId`.

tools.name: note.newNote
tools.description:
This endpoint creates a new note in VTEX DO. Be aware of the following limitations:

- The maximum number of notes for an order is 30.

- The maximum number of characters in a note's description is 2000.

tools.name: task.addComment
tools.description: Adds a comment to a given task, filtering by `taskId`.

tools.name: task.editTask
tools.description: Updates a given task's status, for example, filtering by `taskId`.

tools.name: task.getTask
tools.description: Retrieves a given task, filtering by `taskId`.

tools.name: task.listtasksbyassignee
tools.description:
This endpoint allows you to filter tasks. You can choose between the following filtering options: 

- **Assignees:** using `assignee.email` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?assignee.email={{person@email.com}}&status={{open}}`. 

- **Targets:** using `targetId` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?target.id={{name}}&status={{open}}`. 

- **Paged tasks:** using `page`, `perPage` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?page={{1}}&perPage={{10}}&status=;{{-Closed}}`. 

- **Context:** using `context`, `page`, `perPage` and `status`. Example: `https://{{accountName}}.{{environment}}.com.br/api/do/tasks?context={{context}}&page={{1}}&perPage={{10}}&status={{-Closed}}`.

tools.name: task.newTask
tools.description: Creates a new task in VTEX DO.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
